title: galium pumilum subsp. pinetorum
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. pinetorum, also known as Pine-leaved Bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium pumilum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pine-leaved Bedstraw include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pine-leaved Bedstraw typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
